items.title: Notification Regarding Transactions Related to Debt Instruments (Including Interest)
items.content:
Yapi Kredi Bankasi A.S. announces the completion of a 20,000,000 USD issuance of debt instruments abroad under its 7,000,000,000 USD debt instrument issuance ceiling.

Yapi Kredi Bankasi A.S. has completed a 20,000,000 USD debt instrument issuance abroad through the Global Medium Term Note program. The debt instrument is a private sector bond with a maturity date of 06.04.2026 and a fixed interest rate. The sale was conducted abroad, and the necessary Capital Markets Board (SPK) approval has been obtained for the issuance.

items.title: Issuance of Debt Instrument (Containing Interest)
items.content:
Yapi Kredi Bank has completed a 40,000,000 EUR issuance of debt instruments under its existing debt instrument issuance ceiling.

Yapi Kredi Bank has successfully issued 40,000,000 EUR in debt instruments within its 7,000,000,000 USD debt instrument issuance ceiling. The issuance was conducted through the Global Medium Term Note program. The debt instruments are special sector bonds with a maturity date of 27.05.2026 and a fixed interest rate. Necessary approvals from the Capital Markets Board have been obtained.
